query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A shirtless person stands centered in an open doorway, backlit by bright white light from an adjacent room that casts the figure into silhouette. The individual wears dark loose-fitting pants and stands barefoot on a smooth floor, with hands resting near the waist. Plain walls flank the doorway on both sides, and the interior space surrounding the figure remains dark with only faint ambient illumination revealing the edges of the floor and door frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A shirtless person stands centered in an open doorway, backlit by an intensely overexposed, blown-out white light source that casts the figure into near-total silhouette, obliterating facial features and bodily detail. The individual wears dark loose-fitting pants and stands barefoot on a smooth floor, with hands resting near the waist. Plain walls flank the doorway, while the surrounding interior is plunged into oppressive darkness with crushed shadows. The extreme contrast between blinding highlights and suffocating blackness creates an unsettling atmosphere of dread and visual tension.
